title: Windows Sky Overlay
description: A fabricskybox sky overlay of the Microsoft Windows logo.
body:
A fabricskybox sky overlay of the Microsoft Windows logo. A black sky all around and a white version of the Windows logo front and center. 

**This resource pack requires the mod FabricSkyBoxes. Without it, you will be unable to see it.**

![Windows Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d5dae8867ecf2729b3977858cc28d3a91ee2286_0.webp)
